Bus Timings

13 Bus Timetable Gold Souq Bus Station to Dubai Municipality Staff Housing

December 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 13 is your golden ticket from Gold Souq to Muhaisnah 2. It’s a local favorite, zipping past Dubai’s coolest spots - from buzzing malls to quiet neighborhoods. Need to hit the metro? It’s got you. Heading to work or just exploring? Hop on.

And forget about schedules - these buses show up so often, you’ll barely have time to check your phone. Easy, breezy Dubai travel? Bus 13’s your guy.

Route Name 13
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 9 - Muhaisnah 2, Dubai Municipality Staff Housing
Total Distance Approximately 21 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 35 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 to 00:29 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 13

Bus 13 Route in Dubai

Bus 13 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can check the official RTA website or access this link for 13 Bus Timings.

Also See: Route and Stops for Dubai Bus N55 (Overnight)

Bus Ticket Price

As of February 2024, the standard bus fare in Dubai is AED 3. This fare structure applies to Bus 13, providing an economical option for daily commutes and travel across the city. To facilitate easy and cashless payments, riders can use a Nol Card or the RTA app for seamless transactions.

Bus Booking

Passengers can simply board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route.

Bus Route

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 9

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Al Nakhal

  5. Salah Al Din Metro

  6. Reef Mall

  7. Muraqqabat, Police Station

  8. Abu Baker Al Siddique Metro

  9. Dubai Scout Mission

  10. Al Jadeed Bakery

  11. Shabab Al Ahli Club

  12. Stadium Metro

  13. Ministry Of Information

  14. Al Nahda Metro

  15. Union Cooperative Society

  16. Dubai Airport Free Zone Metro

  17. Fortune Plaza Hotel

  18. Al Qusais Metro

  19. Qusais Police Station

  20. Technical School

  21. FEWA

  22. Russian International School

  23. Emirates Housing

  1. New Housing

  8. Al Shirawi Labour Camp

  9. Masjid Hamad Abdul Karim

  10. Qusais Bus Station External

  11. Al Ghurair Labour Camp

  12. Bu Haleeba Contracting Camp

  13. Madina Supermarket

  14. Galadari Labour Camp

  15. Pioneer Labour Camp

  16. Gargash Labour Camp

  17. Medical Centre

  18. Medical Fitness Centre

  19. Muhaisnah 2, Dubai Municipality Staff Housing

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient and efficient travel experience for commuters using these intersecting bus services.

Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop is a crucial transit hub where Bus Routes 13, 31, and 64 intersect. This central location facilitates seamless travel across various parts of the city, offering passengers easy connections to multiple destinations. Its strategic position and diverse route options enhance convenience for daily commuters and travelers navigating the Al Qusais area.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable destinations and attractions along Bus 13’s route:

  1. Reef Mall: Located near Salah Al Din Metro, this shopping center offers a variety of retail shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Dubai Airport Free Zone: This area houses numerous international businesses and is a prominent commercial hub.

  3. Al Nahda Metro Station: A key transit point connecting to other parts of Dubai.

  4. Dubai Festival City: Although not directly on the route, it’s nearby and offers a wide range of dining, shopping, and entertainment options.

  5. Al Qusais Metro Station: Another important transit hub linking to various destinations across the city.

  6. Russian International School: While primarily an educational institution, it can be of interest to those exploring Dubai’s diverse community.

These stops provide access to shopping, business hubs, and key transportation links, making Bus 13 a valuable route for both locals and visitors.

Journey Experience

The 13 bus route from Gold Souq Bus Station to Dubai Municipality Staff Housing offers an extended journey through some of Dubai’s most vibrant and culturally rich areas.

Read More: Guide to Bus 308 Route and Stops: Sharjah to Jebel Ali

Traveling with Careem

The price for this journey ranges between AED 77 and AED 93, providing a convenient and flexible alternative to public transportation. Whether you’re commuting from central Dubai or exploring the city’s outskirts, Careem offers a reliable and comfortable way to reach your destination.

By offering extensive coverage across key areas, Bus 13 is an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation network. Whether you’re heading to popular shopping destinations or commuting to work, Bus 13 provides a reliable and cost-effective travel option throughout the city. Additionally, with its frequent services and convenient stops, Bus 13 ensures that you can seamlessly navigate through Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods and landmarks.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 27, 2025.
